milestoneTitle: Phase M9.17b.a — Inline action buttons on Learn items replacing the ⋯ collapsed menu. Pin + Mastery toggles are now always-visible icon buttons (28×28 tile) sitting as a flex sibling of the card; tapping either toggles its own state (data-pressed + aria-pressed) and re-renders. Draft items carry an additional red destructive Trash button with two-tap confirm (first tap arms with red fill + 3s disarm, second tap deletes). Matches the user's stored two-tap-destructive pattern; no native confirm() anywhere. Existing long-press-to-drag and swipe-left-for-mastery gestures remain active this milestone (gesture retirement comes in M9.17b.b/c). Static pin/mastery dots removed; .learn-item-pin / .learn-item-mastery CSS retired.
